(usa). adaptive to new situations and challenges. acquainted with working in multicultural contexts achieved through my international experiences both as a student (belgium) and a professional (england). good communication and negotiation skills. excellent teamwork skills in cross-functional environments, good time management and priorities setting, able to work independently under time pressure and operate in conflict situations. strong analytical skills and solid understanding of procedures and processes. always willing to embrace new technological applications and question established ways of working for improvement. sap professional user (production modules), microsoft office advanced user (powerpoint, word & excel) & matlab basic user. ability to read airbus technical documentation (primes, airn@v & sprint). ability to work as and for clients. proven leadership skills through captaincy of my high school football team and as a group leader for volunteer association fundación padre garralda (seville) in 2014. yes / yes. am an industrial engineer specialized in the energy field by taking optional courses from the likes of advanced thermodynamics, renewable energies and power production systems. core courses ranging from mathematical methods, manufacturing and materials technology to business administration. due to an invaluable learning experience during my internship at the leading company airbus defence & space, have developed a keen interest in manufacturing processes, supply chain management and production planning. my goal is to keep growing as a professional engineer within the fascinating aeronautical sector. nevertheless, do not intend to close the door on any other career opportunity. have always wanted to give my career an international approach. both studying and working abroad consolidated this objective and built up ability to collaborate with people from different cultures. consider myself as a proactive and enthusiastic person, with a high degree of responsibility, always willing to accomplish new challenges both in my professional and personal life. travelling, doing sports and spending time with family and friends are what mostly take up my spare time. for more information on europass go to http://europass.cedefop.europa.eu european union, 2004-2010 24082010
